channel.title: Microsoft Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Microsoft Corporation (microsoft).

item.title: CVE-2026-50511 · 7.8 HIGH — Microsoft PC Manager Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper link resolution before file access ('link following') in Microsoft PC Manager allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-50512 · 7.8 HIGH — Microsoft PC Manager Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Missing authentication for critical function in Microsoft PC Manager allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44804 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44813 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42993 · 7.5 HIGH — Remote Desktop Client Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Remote Desktop Client allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-44812 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Graphics Component Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Integer overflow or wraparound in Windows Win32K - GRFX allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44803 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Graphics Component Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Integer overflow or wraparound in Windows Win32K - GRFX allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42987 · 8.1 HIGH — Windows Deployment Services (WDS) Remote Code Execution
item.description: Use after free in Windows Deployment Services allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42985 · 8.8 HIGH — Remote Desktop Client Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Remote Desktop Client allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-44801 · 7.5 HIGH — Remote Desktop Client Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Remote Desktop Client allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-44814 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows DWM Core Library Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Out-of-bounds read in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44802 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42983 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44815 · 9.8 CRITICAL — DHCP Client Service Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in Windows DHCP Client allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-44799 · 7.5 HIGH — Remote Desktop Client Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Remote Desktop Client allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-44807 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44808 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44811 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44805 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Network Controller (NC) Host Agent Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Network Controller (NC) Host Agent allows an authorized attacker to deny service locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42992 · 7.5 HIGH — Remote Desktop Client Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Remote Desktop Client allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-44810 · 8.4 HIGH — Microsoft Cryptographic Services Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper authentication in Windows Cryptographic Services allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-44809 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Common Log File System Driver Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Common Log File System Driver allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42989 · 7.8 HIGH — Winlogon Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Improper link resolution before file access ('link following') in Winlogon allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42991 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Push Notifications Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Windows Push Notifications allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42979 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Push Notifications Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Windows Push Notifications allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42977 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Push Notifications Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Windows Push Notifications allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42978 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows Push Notifications Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Windows Push Notifications allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42986 · 7.8 HIGH — Microsoft Graphics Component Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Microsoft Graphics Component allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42974 · 8.1 HIGH — Windows Performance Monitor Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Integer underflow (wrap or wraparound) in Windows Performance Monitor allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42981 · 8.1 HIGH — Windows Performance Monitor Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Integer underflow (wrap or wraparound) in Windows Performance Monitor allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42984 · 7 HIGH — Windows Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Kernel allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42973 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Push Notification Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Use of uninitialized resource in Windows Push Notifications allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42970 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Push Notification Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Use of uninitialized resource in Windows Push Notifications allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42971 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Push Notification Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Use of uninitialized resource in Windows Push Notifications allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42969 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Push Notification Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Use of uninitialized resource in Windows Push Notifications allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42972 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Hyper-V Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor in Windows Hyper-V allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42968 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Telephony Server Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Out-of-bounds read in Windows Telephony Service allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42915 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Windows TCP/IP Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect calculation of buffer size in Windows TCP/IP allows an authorized attacker to deny service over an adjacent network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42914 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Windows Kerberos Denial of Service Vulnerability
item.description: Windows Kerberos Denial of Service Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2026-42912 · 7 HIGH — Windows Telephony Service Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Concurrent execution using shared resource with improper synchronization ('race condition') in Windows Telephony Service allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42913 · 7.5 HIGH — Remote Desktop Client Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Remote Desktop Client allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42911 · 7 HIGH — Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows Ancillary Function Driver for WinSock allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42916 · 7.8 HIGH — NT OS Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Integer underflow (wrap or wraparound) in Windows NT OS Kernel allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42909 · 7.5 HIGH — Remote Desktop Client Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Remote Desktop Client allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42980 · 7.8 HIGH — NT OS Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Integer underflow (wrap or wraparound) in Windows NT OS Kernel allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42908 · 7.5 HIGH — Windows Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Out-of-bounds read in Windows RDP allows an unauthorized attacker to disclose information over a network.

item.title: CVE-2026-42907 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Windows Shell Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor in Windows Shell allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42906 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Windows Shell Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor in Windows Shell allows an authorized attacker to disclose information locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42905 · 7.8 HIGH — Windows DWM Core Library Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Use after free in Windows DWM Core Library allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

item.title: CVE-2026-42904 · 9.6 CRITICAL — Windows TCP/IP Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in Windows TCP/IP allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over an adjacent network.
